description: Lucid provides visual collaboration products such as diagramming and whiteboarding, along with developer tooling for extensions, custom shapes, and integrations. Its developer platform includes APIs for Lucid resources and tools for building extensions for Lucid editors.
summary: lucid.co exposes a documented REST API authenticated by either Lucid API keys or Lucid OAuth 2.0 clients, plus a public documentation MCP server and a public npm CLI (`lucid-package`).
